2603.16590.title: BATQuant: Outlier-resilient MXFP4 Quantization via Learnable Block-wise Optimization
2603.16590.paper_summary: Microscaling floating-point (MXFP) formats have emerged as a promising standard for deploying Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) on modern accelerator architectures. However, existing Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) methods, particularly rotation-based techniques designed for integer formats, suffer from severe performance collapse when applied to MXFP4. Recent studies attribute this failure to a fundamental format mismatch: global orthogonal rotations inadvertently transfer outlier energy across quantization blocks, inducing new outliers that disrupt local block-wise scaling, while often creating bimodal activation distributions that underutilize the limited quantization range. To address these issues, we propose BATQuant (Block-wise Affine Transformation), which restricts transformations to align with MXFP granularity to prevent cross-block outlier propagation, while relaxing orthogonality constraints to optimize distribution shaping. To ensure parameter efficiency, we introduce Global and Private Kronecker (GPK) decomposition to effectively reduces storage and runtime overhead and incorporate Block-wise Learnable Clipping to suppress residual outliers. Extensive experiments on both MLLMs and LLMs demonstrate that BATQuant establishes new state-of-the-art results under aggressive W4A4KV16 configurations, recovering up to 96.43% of full-precision performance on multimodal benchmarks and clearly outperforming existing methods across diverse tasks.
2603.16590.paper_summary_zh: 微縮浮點數 (MXFP) 格式已成為在現代加速器架構上部署多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 和大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的一個有前途的標準。<lb/>然而，現有的後訓練量化 (PTQ) 方法，特別是針對整數格式設計的基於旋轉的技術，在應用於 MXFP4 時遭遇了嚴重的性能崩潰。<lb/>最近的研究將這一失敗歸因於根本的格式不匹配：全局正交旋轉無意中將異常值能量轉移到量化區塊之間，導致新的異常值破壞局部區塊的縮放，同時經常產生低效利用有限量化範圍的雙模激活分佈。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 BATQuant（區塊式仿射變換），它限制變換與 MXFP 粒度對齊，以防止跨區塊異常值的傳播，同時放寬正交性約束以優化分佈形狀。<lb/>為了確保參數效率，我們引入了全局和私有克羅內克 (GPK) 分解，有效減少存儲和運行時開銷，並結合區塊式可學習裁剪以抑制殘餘異常值。<lb/>在 MLLMs 和 LLMs 上的廣泛實驗表明，BATQuant 在激進的 W4A4KV16 配置下建立了新的最先進結果，恢復了多模態基準上高達 96.43% 的全精度性能，並在各種任務中明顯超越現有方法。
2603.16590.author: Ji-Fu Li et.al.
2603.16590.authors: Ji-Fu Li, Manyi Zhang, Xiaobo Xia, Han Bao, Haoli Bai, Zhenhua Dong, Xianzhi Yu
